summary: Iteration 119: Verified dashboard and daily summary bug fixes. Dashboard Total Sales card now shows cash/bank/online breakdown. Dashboard Total Expenses card shows top 3 expense categories. Daily Summary range endpoint no longer doubles sales totals. All 13 backend tests passed, frontend UI tests passed.

fixed_by_main_agent.issue: Sales totals were being doubled (line 761 added final_amount AND line 762 added get_sale_total)
Sales with null final_amount were not handled correctly
fixed_by_main_agent.fix: Added get_sale_total helper function that handles null final_amount
Added map_mode helper that maps 'card' to 'bank' and ignores 'discount'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard and Daily Summary features fully tested. Double-counting bug in daily-summary-range endpoint has been fixed. Dashboard now displays cash/bank/online breakdown below Total Sales card and top 3 expense categories below Total Expenses card. Key validation: March 5, 2026 shows SAR 1,000 (not doubled to SAR 2,000). Sales page Grand Total is SAR 64,662.47 (54 sales).

dashboard_enhancements.total_sales_card_breakdown: PASSED - Shows Cash: SAR 25,643, Bank: SAR 26,100, Online: SAR 6,026
dashboard_enhancements.total_expenses_card_categories: PASSED - Shows top 3: partner_salary (SAR 166,655), salary (SAR 32,176), Supplier Purchase (SAR 8,496)

daily_summary_fixes.range_totals: PASSED - Shows SAR 3,600.00 for Mar 1-8 (9 transactions)
daily_summary_fixes.day_by_day_view: PASSED - Individual days show correct non-doubled totals

backend_apis.GET_dashboard_stats: PASSED - Returns cash_sales, bank_sales, online_sales, expense_by_category
backend_apis.GET_daily_summary_range: PASSED - Returns correct aggregated and daily breakdown
